issue_title: [Bug] Tree: zNodeClick not emitted on mouse click + spacing issues
issue_body_preview:
## Description

The `(zNodeClick)` output on `z-tree` does not emit when a node is clicked with the mouse. It only fires via keyboard (Enter key). This is because `ZardTreeNodeComponent.onContentClick()` calls `treeService.select()` but never notifies the parent `ZardTreeComponent` to emit the outpu
test_description_zh: 在页面上渲染一个 z-tree 组件，绑定 (zNodeClick) 事件处理器。用鼠标点击树节点，观察 (zNodeClick) 事件是否被触发并正确回调。同时检查树节点之间的间距是否正常显示，无多余空白或重叠。
expected_result_zh: 鼠标点击树节点时，(zNodeClick) 事件应正常触发，回调函数接收到对应的节点数据。树节点之间的间距应合理、一致，无异常的空白间隔或元素重叠问题。
